stemHtml: ATC taxi clearances always contain a clearance limit. Which statement about crossing a runway during taxi is correct?

options.a: If the taxi route crosses a runway, an explicit clearance to cross must be included.
options.b: ATC would never issue instructions routing past a runway.
options.c: A runway crossing is implied in the clearance limit.
options.d: Taxi instructions never include a runway crossing even if the limit is beyond it.
